title: Freeze the v0.1 core field matrix
problem_statement: The consultation draft, schemas, examples, and CLI scaffolds imply the CCP core field set but do not yet define a single normative required/optional/nullability matrix. That ambiguity blocks schema hardening and repo-contract work.
desired_end_state: The consultation draft names the v0.1 required and optional fields for CR, DR, EP, and EV, including nullability, primary authorship, and field semantics.
acceptance_criteria: The consultation draft contains a normative field table for each core object
The field table resolves whether unset optional fields are omitted or explicitly nulled
The field table is precise enough to drive downstream schema-tightening work
non_goals: Finalize the canonical on-disk repo layout
constraints: Keep the core model portable and implementation-neutral
Prefer omission over null when an optional field has no value
